finding: `node atm.mjs next --prompt ... --json` in the 3KLife planning repository timed out while scanning a large task ledger, preventing normal preflight from returning a playbook in an interactive window.
expectedBehavior: Planning-ledger discovery should use indexed or bounded task lookup and emit progress/timeout diagnostics with a recovery command.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced while creating Cross-Vendor Team Markdown Handoff cards 0072-0074: 120s and 180s attempts did not return a route.
followUp: Benchmark the planner against large ledgers, introduce task-id/path prefiltering, and add a focused timeout regression.
